headline: Citi Cuts Lucid Price Target to $14: Q1 Miss, Pulled Guidance Test the Saudi-Backed EV Maker
summary: Citi just trimmed its price target on Lucid Group (NASDAQ:LCID) to $14 from $17, while keeping a Buy rating. Analyst Michael Ward cited the company’s Q1 2026 miss and the withdrawal of its 2026 outlook, but argued the medium-term thesis remains intact. For long-term investors, the price target cut reads as a sobering near-term recalibration ... Citi Cuts Lucid Price Target to $14: Q1 Miss, Pulled Guidance Test the Saudi-Backed EV Maker

headline: Why The Narrative Around Nel (OB:NEL) Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Fair Value Assumptions
summary: Nel’s fair value price target has shifted from NOK 2.13 to NOK 2.12, a small adjustment that still matters if you are watching the stock closely. Analysts linking this move to refreshed assumptions around execution risk, revenue potential and margin progression are largely keeping neutral ratings while trimming their targets. As you read on, you will see how these price target tweaks fit into the broader analyst narrative and how to keep track of it as it evolves. Analyst Price Targets don't...
